meta.title: Lockheed wants to stick ARRW hypersonic missiles on the F-35?!
meta.description:
The original post on X/Twitter: https://x.com/AirPowerNEW1/status/1969875651600515100

With AFA’s 2025 Air, Space, and Cyber Conference going on this week, everybody’s talking about Lockheed Martin’s new fighter drone and Boeing kicking off production on the F-47… but I want to talk about this picture… Because it shows an F-35 doing something that it has no right to be able to do.
